fix: Replace substring 'id' matching with suffix '_id' in get_trait_columns() (#75) (#76)

* fix: Replace substring 'id' matching with suffix '_id' in get_trait_columns() (#75)

The common_metadata pattern list used bare "id" for substring matching,
which incorrectly excluded trait columns containing "width" (w-id-th),
"widths" (w-id-ths), and "solidity" (sol-id-ity). All legitimate ID
metadata columns in SLEAP Roots data use the *_id suffix pattern.

Split common_metadata into substring patterns (unchanged) and suffix
patterns (new "_id" matched with str.endswith()). This restores 27
silently dropped trait columns across fixture datasets and 3 in
Turface data (Maximum.Width.mm, Width-to-Depth.Ratio, Solidity).

Added 10 new tests: 4 unit tests targeting the bug directly, 6
integration tests validating trait classification across 5 real fixture
CSVs with different column naming conventions. Updated pre-existing
Turface pipeline integration test to reflect correct trait counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: Mark tasks.md checkboxes as completed

Address Copilot review comment — update TDD task checklist to reflect
actual completion status with notes on test results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Replace complement-based assertions in
  test_metadata_columns_are_complement_of_traits with meaningful checks:
  known metadata cols excluded, traits are numeric, no _id in traits
- Fix stale print message in test_qc_pipeline_turface_integration to
  use actual metadata values instead of hardcoded old numbers
- Update OpenSpec proposal and tasks with review changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: Mark Task 5 complete — full suite passes (1889/1889)

commit.message:
SNS投稿自動生成アプリを追加

ホリエモンAI学校介護校のSNSアカウント向けに、毎日最新トレンド・ニュースをもとに
Claude AIが自動でX/Instagram/Facebook/LinkedIn用の投稿文を生成するアプリを追加。

- trends.py: Google Trends + 複数RSSフィードからトレンド収集
- generator.py: スクールのブランド文脈・介護業界特有の課題をプロンプトに組み込み
- storage.py: 生成結果をJSON形式で日付別に保存・履歴管理
- web_ui.py: 投稿確認・コピー用Flaskダッシュボード
- main.py: 毎日指定時刻に自動実行するスケジューラー

commit.message:
Move Mevo cold shoe mount from bottom to top of capsule

Plane.XZ normal is -Y in build123d, so offset(max_y) placed geometry
at the bottom. Fixed by negating all XZ offsets and flipping extrusion
directions so the cold shoe sits on the top (Y+) surface.

commit.message:
Improve Groq transcription quality: raise silence threshold, filter gibberish

- Raise Groq silence threshold from RMS 200 to 300 (cloud calls on
  near-silence produce hallucinations like CJK/Cyrillic gibberish)
- Add non-ASCII hallucination filter: reject text with >20% non-ASCII
  alphabetic chars (catches "이라고ва" style whisper hallucinations)
- Add repeated punctuation filter: catches ". . . . . ." patterns

Add diagnostic logging and error propagation for batch schedule debugging

All 25 cases fail silently on "Send Now" — errors are swallowed with no
visibility into root cause. This adds error propagation from scheduleEmail/

and browser console output with first error in toast.

commit.message:
Fix data/ group-write permissions for j105logger service

Files created by CLI commands (e.g. j105-logger add-user) as weaties
inherit the default umask 022, stripping group-write. The j105logger
service account could read but not write the database.

Two fixes:
- setup.sh: add UMask=0002 to the systemd unit so the service creates
  group-writable files
- deploy.sh: chmod -R g+w data/ before restart so files created by CLI
  commands become writable by the service

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: downgrade client disconnect errors to debug log

When a client cancels a request mid-flight, the proxy logged an ERROR
with a full stack trace for "context canceled". This is normal behavior,
not an error — downgrade to V(1) debug and abort cleanly.

commit.message:
v22.12: Sequential image gen to fix nanobanana network errors

Separate text and image ops in generateBloomBatch:
- Text posts: parallel in batches of 3 (fast, reliable)
- Image posts: sequential one-at-a-time AFTER text completes
  (nanobanana fails when multiple concurrent fetch calls compete)
This matches how Studio runs image ops - one at a time.

Reorder header: Paper title before authors (academic standard)

Proper academic ordering:
1. Repository title

3. arXiv reference and year
4. Authors
5. Brief description

This follows standard academic convention where the work/paper
comes before author attribution.

fix: improve triage classification for changed-behavior bug reports (#1255)

## Summary

- **issue-triage skill**: Add changed-behavior language examples ("no
longer works", "used to work") as a strong signal for bug
classification, reducing misclassification of bug reports as feature
requests.

## Evidence

<details><summary>Triage misclassification (1 occurrence)</summary>

Run
[22627101869](https://github.com/max-sixty/worktrunk/actions/runs/22627101869)
triaged issue #1249 ("Files in `.git/info/exclude` are **no longer
hidden** after `wt switch` if using jj") as a feature request. The
title's "no longer" language signals a bug, but the terse body led the
bot to default to the feature-request template.

</details>

## Test plan

- [ ] Verify next regression-titled issue is classified as bug report

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

commit.message:
Fix ibuprofen nodes not pairing when another same-date personal node comes first

buildChronologicalRows now checks for a link_group match among all same-timestamp
personal nodes before falling back to the first-encountered pairing. When a better
match exists further in the array, interleaved solo-personal rows are emitted first,
then the linked pair — fixing the ibuprofen ↔ icon not rendering in Ch3.

commit.message:
Improve profile physics, device-specific defaults, and trace aesthetics

- Device-specific profile defaults: Profiles::for_device() dispatches on
  device ID, with separate DIII-D and ITER tanh-pedestal parameters in ρ
  space (expin/expout updated per OMFIT Hmode_profiles convention)
- Fix hollow Te/ne profiles during ramp-up by clamping core ≥ edge
- Realistic l_i smoothing: τ_CR coefficient 0.4→2.0 with Ip-weighted
  blend (0.1–0.3 MA) to eliminate boundary spikes
- Reduce ELM particle loss fractions (Type I: 0.5→0.15, Type II: 0.4→0.10)
  for monotonic ne_bar consistent with experimental traces
- Cap q95 y-axis at 10 to avoid display spikes during ramp-up/down
- Thomson scatter realism: non-uniform radial sampling (edge-dense),
  profile-dependent noise scaling (core noisier, edge tighter)

commit.message:
fix: pre-flight validation before Windows update apply (#432) (#441)

## Summary
- Adds comprehensive pre-flight validation before writing/spawning the
Windows update batch script
- Extracts `validateWindowsUpdatePrerequisites()` — validates
Update.exe, downloaded installer, and temp directory writability
- Applies validation to both `applyUpdate()` and `applyUpdateOnQuit()`
win32 paths
- Errors propagate with actionable user-facing messages instead of
failing silently

## Changes
- **`src/main/services/auto-update-service.ts`**
- New exported `validateWindowsUpdatePrerequisites()` function with
three checks:
    1. `Update.exe` exists (Squirrel installation not corrupted)
    2. Downloaded installer still on disk (not quarantined by AV)
    3. Temp directory is writable (batch script can be created)
- `applyUpdate()` win32 path: replaced the inline `Update.exe` check
(from #433) with the comprehensive validation function
- `applyUpdateOnQuit()` win32 path: added pre-flight validation
(previously had no checks at all)
- Removed the outer `if (fs.existsSync(downloadPath))` guard in both
paths — the validation function now handles this with a proper error
message instead of silently skipping

- **`src/main/services/auto-update-service.test.ts`**
  - 7 new test cases for `validateWindowsUpdatePrerequisites()`:
    - Passes with all prerequisites met (with and without Update.exe)
    - Throws with actionable message when Update.exe is missing
- Throws when downloaded installer is missing (AV quarantine scenario)
    - Throws when temp directory is not writable
    - Validates check ordering (Update.exe checked first)
    - Confirms no temp files are left behind after writable check

## Relationship to #433
PR #433 (merged) added an inline `Update.exe` check in `applyUpdate()`.
This PR subsumes that check and adds the two missing validations
(download path + temp writable) requested in #432, plus extends coverage
to `applyUpdateOnQuit()`.

## Test Plan
- [x] All 5392 tests pass
- [x] Typecheck passes (`tsc --noEmit`)
- [x] 7 new unit tests for the validation function
- [ ] Manual: on Windows, corrupt Squirrel install (rename Update.exe) →
verify actionable error
- [ ] Manual: on Windows, delete downloaded installer before applying →
verify error message
- [ ] Manual: on Windows, make temp dir read-only → verify error message
- [ ] Manual: normal update flow still works end-to-end

## Manual Validation
1. Build and install on Windows
2. Download an update (state = "ready")
3. Test each failure mode:
- Rename `Update.exe` → click "Restart to update" → expect "Update.exe
not found" error in UI
- Delete the downloaded Setup.exe → click update → expect "Update file
was removed" error
- Make `%TEMP%` read-only → click update → expect "Cannot write to temp
directory" error
4. Verify normal update path still works when all prerequisites pass

Closes #432

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 수온 Y축 범위 과다 버그 수정 — 0 기준 동적 산출

- 수온은 effectiveMin=0부터 범위 계산 (기존: 데이터 min 기준 산출 후 0으로 밀어서 범위 팽창)
- 수온 4~6°C → Y축 0~10 step1 (기존 0~16)
- 수온 8~14°C → Y축 0~16 step2 (기존 0~24 step1)
- 기온은 기존처럼 데이터 기준 산출 유지

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: multi-axis retrieval — 6 independent pgvector searches per brain region

Replace single-embedding cosine search with 6 independent per-region vector
queries (hippo, amyg, pfc, sensory, striatum, cerebellum). Each memory now
stores 6 regional embedding vectors alongside the existing semantic embedding.

Phase 1: LLM cue decomposition via _llm_decompose() produces both text strings
and scores per region in a single call. Heuristic encoding removed.

Phase 2: Alembic migration 004 adds 6 Vector(1024) columns with ivfflat
indexes. Store populates on write; backfill dreamer job handles existing rows.

Phase 3: _multi_axis_search() runs 6 pgvector queries, aggregates per-region
cosine scores. Graceful fallback to single-embedding search when decomposition
unavailable.

Phase 4: Alpha-blended convergence formula balances breadth (dims matched) with
peak match quality: α * dims_matched * mean_score + (1-α) * max_score.

Phase 5: retrieve() accepts optional dimensional_cues parameter — callers can
inject pre-tagged region strings that override LLM decomposition. Wired through
API schema, endpoint, and client SDK.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix config.php for installer: only '<?php', no $config definition

The EE installer's preflight() uses isset($config) to detect fresh
installs. With '$config = array()', isset() returns true and the
installer tries to load DB config from config.php, failing with
'Unable to locate any database connection information'. Writing
only '<?php' makes isset($config) false, triggering the correct
first-time install path that shows the setup wizard form.

fix: static build config + companion status indicator (#128)

* fix: generate config.js at build time for Vercel deployment

The frontend loads config from /config.js which the Bun server generates
dynamically in dev. On Vercel there's no server, so the build script now
generates dist/config.js from CONVEX_URL env var after Bun.build() completes.
Build fails if CONVEX_URL is missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add companion status indicator to sidebar

Shows a status badge above UserMenu in the sidebar:
- Green dot + "Connected" when heartbeat is within 30s
- Yellow dot + "Stale" when 30s–5min old
- Gray dot + "Offline" when no heartbeat for 5+ min

Tooltip shows last seen time and active session count. When offline,
includes a message explaining tasks will queue but not execute.

Extracts useCompanionStatus hook for reuse across components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: warn when companion is offline in start session flow

ClaudeButton now shows a yellow warning when the companion is offline,
letting users know their task will queue but won't start until the
companion reconnects.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: run convex codegen before Bun.build() in static build

Vercel builds fail because @convex/_generated/api doesn't exist.
The build script now runs `bunx convex codegen` before bundling
to generate the Convex type stubs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: address Greptile review feedback

- Pass `now` explicitly to deriveState instead of void trick
- Show stale warning in ClaudeButton (not just offline)
- Use div with biome-ignore instead of semantic <output> element

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address Greptile feedback and Vercel build failure

Build script:
- Move CONVEX_URL check before codegen/build (fail fast)
- Remove VERCEL env hack — set CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY on Vercel instead

CompanionStatus:
- Add 'loading' state to avoid flashing "Offline" on page load
- Show skeleton while useQuery resolves
- Switch back to <output> element (valid per spec for status indicators)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: commit convex/_generated and remove codegen from build

Convex codegen doesn't support CI environments (no deploy key support).
Per Convex docs, the generated code should be checked into version
control. Remove codegen from build.ts and un-gitignore convex/_generated/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: show stale warning in companion tooltip (match ClaudeButton)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: update codegen references for committed _generated

- Pre-commit hook: stage convex/_generated/ after codegen
- CI workflows: remove redundant codegen steps (files are in git)
- test-e2e-isolated.sh: remove redundant cp of _generated to worktree

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: deploy Convex functions on production Vercel builds

After the frontend build succeeds, if VERCEL_ENV is 'production',
run convex deploy to push functions. This ties frontend and backend
deployments together — if Convex deploy fails, the Vercel build fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update CLAUDE.md for committed convex/_generated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: share single timer across useCompanionStatus consumers

Replace per-component setInterval with a module-level singleton using
useSyncExternalStore. All consumers of useCompanionStatus now share
one 5-second interval that auto-starts/stops based on subscriber count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add homeDir comment referencing #130

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: refresh now on re-subscribe to prevent stale status

When all consumers unmount and remount later, the module-level `now`
was frozen at the last tick value. This could briefly show "Connected"
when the companion had been offline for minutes. Refresh `now` when
starting a new interval.

* ci: add codegen drift check to catch stale convex/_generated

Runs convex codegen in CI and verifies no diff against committed files.
Catches cases where schema changes are committed without updated
generated types (e.g. when local backend wasn't running for codegen).
